message:
feat(fp-frame): add truncate, replace_regex, and to_string_truncated

- DataFrame.truncate(before, after): filter rows by index label range
- DataFrame.replace_regex(pat, repl): regex replacement across Utf8 columns
- DataFrame.to_string_truncated(max_rows, max_cols): truncated display
  with "..." ellipsis for large DataFrames
- 3 new tests (872 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
